mapper.select: select m.id from menu m left join sys_menu_role srm on srm.menu_id = m.id where m.role_id = #{roleId} order by m.parent_id, m.order_num

select distinct m.perms from sys_user_role sur left join sys_role_menu srm on sur.role_id = srm.role_id left join menu m on srm.menu_id = menu.id where sur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.menu_type in ('C', 'M') AND m.status = 0 AND m.del_flag = 0

select DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.visible, m.status, IFNULL(m.perms,'') AS perms, m.is_frame, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_user_role sur left join sys_role_menu srm on sur.role_id = srm.role_id left join menu m on srm.menu_id = menu.id where sur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.menu_type in ('C', 'M') AND m.status = 0 AND m.del_flag = 0

select DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.visible, m.status, IFNULL(m.perms,'') AS perms, m.is_frame, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.order_num, m.create_time from sys_user_role sur left join sys_role_menu srm on sur.role_id = srm.role_id left join menu m on srm.menu_id = menu.id where m.menu_type in ('C', 'M') AND m.status = 0 AND m.del_flag = 0
